pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
Replace deprecated springfox dependencies with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for API documentation in Spring Boot 3.
Add explicit javax.validation dependency to resolve potential classpath issues during migration.
Add wiremock-jre8-standalone dependency for testing external service interactions.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Update spring-cloud-gateway-mvc version to 4.1.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add pitest-maven plugin for mutation testing with specific configuration for Java 21.
Update the Node.js version used by frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for better compatibility.
Configure maven-surefire-plugin to fix event transmission issues during test execution.
Refine Jacoco coverage configuration to exclude specific utility and config classes from coverage checks.
Configure maven-jar-plugin to set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.
Add a new Maven profile for running with Wiremock enabled.
Add a new Maven profile for integration testing with frontend build steps.
Rename the artifact ID from 'kitchensink' to 'team03' to reflect the project identity.
Ensure the group ID is correctly set to edu.ucsb.cs156.
Add a properties section to define reusable variables like mainClass and package paths.
Reorganize the pom.xml structure with comments and sections for better readability.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven explicitly via apk since it is no longer provided by the base image.
Install bash explicitly via apk as it is not present by default in minimal Alpine images.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or tools.
Upgrade Node.js from version 12 to 16.20.0 using nvm to ensure compatibility with modern frontend tooling.
Add Maven build step to compile and package the Java application during image creation.
Define the specific JAR file execution command to run the application instead of a generic bash shell.
Copy source code, frontend assets, and configuration files into the image for the build process.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the old project README with a new template-based README for a specific team assignment, including updated instructions, version info, and feature descriptions.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced entire README.md content with new template text

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect the new project name or context.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default with TypeScript type annotation.
Update story file glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs extensions and remove deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add new Storybook addons for onboarding, Chromatic integration, and interactions.
Explicitly define the Storybook framework to use react-webpack5.
Configure static directories to serve public assets in Storybook.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to deprecation or change in build strategy.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.human_impl: Removed webpackFinal function and WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning import

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Initialize Mock Service Worker with dynamic URL handling for localhost vs GitHub Pages.
Wrap Storybook stories with ToastContainer to display toast notifications.
Refactor preview configuration to use the modern default export object with parameters and loaders.
Add mswLoader to the preview loaders array to handle MSW requests in stories.

frontend/jsconfig.json.general_idea: Adjust the baseUrl in jsconfig.json to use a relative path without the leading dot for cleaner configuration.
Explicitly define the include array in jsconfig.json to specify which directories should be included in the project scope.

Upgrade which-module for accurate module resolution.
Add which-typed-array for typed array detection.
Upgrade word-wrap for text formatting utilities.

Upgrade workbox-expiration for cache expiration management.
Upgrade workbox-google-analytics for offline analytics support.
Upgrade workbox-navigation-preload for faster navigation.
Upgrade workbox-precaching for asset precaching.
Upgrade workbox-range-requests for partial content support.
Add workbox-recipes for common caching patterns.

Upgrade workbox-strategies for caching strategies.

Update y18n package from 4.0.3 to 5.0.8 to align with newer ecosystem standards.
Update yallist package from 4.0.0 to 3.1.1, likely due to transitive dependency resolution changes.

Add yoctocolors and yoctocolors-cjs as new dev dependencies, likely introduced by updated tooling.
